privileged_info_summary: The task is reverse-engineering a proprietary legacy JAR file (legacy-auth-1.0.jar) to discover validation requirements. The LegacyValidator class embedded in the JAR requires transaction IDs to: (1) have exactly 16 characters total length, (2) start with the prefix 'SEC-V2-', and (3) end with an even digit. These requirements are verified by analyzing the source code in setup_task.sh which generates the test JAR with hardcoded validation logic using prefix 'SEC-V2-' and length requirement of 16. All metadata values match the authoritative setup logic.
